title: A focused nephrology hospital, built around the patients we serve.
lead: SS Kidney Care opened its doors in Sambalpur in 2023 with a simple idea — that advanced kidney care should be specialist-led, locally available, and honestly explained. We've been growing carefully since.
mission_body: To give every kidney patient in western Odisha and the surrounding region the same standard of nephrology care a family member would expect — close to home, in their own language, without the long-distance referrals that once defined kidney care here.

values.name: Listening first
values.body: Every consult starts with your story, not a clipboard.

values.name: Plain words
values.body: We translate test results and treatment options into language you can act on.

values.name: Conservative care
values.body: If you don't need a procedure, we'll tell you. If you do, we'll explain it.

values.name: Always available
values.body: Our 24×7 line is staffed by a dialysis-trained nurse, not a call centre.

values.name: Continuous learning
values.body: We follow the evidence and audit our outcomes — and we tell you what we've learned.
